title: About me
p1: I'm Christopher Lamberti, a Systems Engineering student at the National University of Costa Rica and a fullstack developer with real-world project experience.
p2: I have designed, developed, and deployed 6 web applications for real clients in Costa Rica, using modern technologies like React, Next.js, Nuxt 4, and PostgreSQL. I'm passionate about building products that solve real problems.
p3: I work remotely, adapt quickly to new technologies, and focus on delivering clean, scalable solutions with great user experience.
